description_long: This object depicts a small residential property featuring two distinct buildings set on a rectangular plot with grass, a paved path, and landscaping. The left building is a single-story house with a thatched roof, brick walls, and small rectangular windows, evoking a rustic, traditional style. The right building is a brick structure with a steep gable roof, arched windows, and a prominent steeple, resembling a small chapel or community hall. The plot is bordered by a low curb and includes several trees, shrubs, and flowerbeds, adding to the suburban or rural neighborhood feel. The buildings are separated by a central tree and a small garden area, with the main entryways facing the street. The overall scene is detailed, with clear architectural features and landscaping elements that suggest a peaceful, well-maintained residential environment.
description: A detailed residential property with a thatched-roof house and a brick building with a steeple, set on a landscaped plot with trees and a paved path.
description_view_0: Front view showing both the thatched-roof house on the left and the brick building with a steeple on the right, separated by a tree and garden.
description_view_1: Side view focusing on the brick building's arched windows and steeple, with the thatched house partially visible behind.
description_view_2: Angled view highlighting the rear and side of both buildings, with the central tree and garden area between them.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the thatched-roof house and the side of the brick building, with the paved path running alongside.
attribute_architectural_style: Traditional European rural with vernacular and chapel elements
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with arched and rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main doors facing the street, no porch, minimal steps, and modest landscaping at the entry
